title: Precompute Values Outside Loop
description: Compute expensive values (like string transformations) once before the loop instead of recalculating inside the loop
energy_impact: Reduces function calls from O(N*M) to O(M) where N=items, M=tax columns. For 1000 items and 5 taxes: 10000 → 10 string operations.
key_insight: Move invariant computations (like string transformations, regex compilations) outside loops. Use a cache dictionary.
